title: Agricultural Engineers
description: Apply knowledge of engineering technology and biological science to agricultural problems concerned with power and machinery, electrification, structures, soil and water conservation, and processing of agricultural products.

tasks.text: Prepare reports, sketches, working drawings, specifications, proposals, and budgets for proposed sites or systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Visit sites to observe environmental problems, to consult with contractors, or to monitor construction activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with clients, such as district or regional councils, farmers, and developers, to discuss their needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Discuss plans with clients, contractors, consultants, and other engineers so that they can be evaluated and necessary changes made.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test agricultural machinery and equipment to ensure adequate performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and direct construction of rural electric-power distribution systems, and irrigation, drainage, and flood control systems for soil and water conservation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide advice on water quality and issues related to pollution management, river control, and ground and surface water resources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design structures for crop storage, animal shelter and loading, and animal and crop processing, and supervise their construction.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct educational programs that provide farmers or farm cooperative members with information that can help them improve agricultural productivity.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design sensing, measuring, and recording devices, and other instrumentation used to study plant or animal life.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design agricultural machinery components and equipment, using computer-aided design (CAD) technology.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and supervise environmental and land reclamation projects in agriculture and related industries.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design food processing plants and related mechanical systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise food processing or manufacturing plant operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
